__rationale__: Passing fixture for MR-55: methylation-aware restriction-enzyme planning. Construct describes a SpeI digest (methylation-insensitive isoschizomer of XbaI) on plasmid DNA from a dam+ host; no methylation-blocked enzyme is in the plan. v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-55. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (digest plan vs host.methylation_phenotype cross-check).
